title: fraxinus oxycarpa subsp. parvifolia
intro: Fraxinus oxycarpa subsp. parvifolia, also known as Manchurian ash or narrowleaf ash, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus oxycarpa subsp. parvifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Fraxinus oxycarpa subsp. parvifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
